TaskDescription: Continuous long-term pre-surgical intracranial EEG monitoring of patients with pharmacoresistant epilepsy.
Instructions: Passive long-term clinical monitoring; no task performed.
InstitutionName: Sleep-Wake-Epilepsy-Center, Department of Neurology, Inselspital, Bern University Hospital, University of Bern
iEEGReference: Median reference across channels (per the SWEC-ETHZ long-term recording protocol; see ReferencesAndLinks).

Butterworth4_zerophase.Description: Digital band-pass filter applied at the source (0.5-150 Hz, 4th-order Butterworth, forward-backward).

iEEGPlacementScheme: Mixed intracranial strip, grid, and depth electrodes; per-contact placement not disclosed (anonymized).
